Zzz... Are you just resting your eyes, Dad? 😴

Happy Father's Day

To an Incredible Dad

"A father is neither an anchor to hold us back, nor a sail to take us there, but a guiding light whose love shows us the way."
— Unknown
🔊 Just Dad's Things!
  • Blasting Facebook Reels at 100% volume in the dead of night
  • Getting instantly angry over a single light bulb left on, yet melting into an absolute softie seconds later
  • Gets emotional instantly when a sad/emotional scene appears.
  • Saying "I'll just rest" and always ends up sleeping.
  • Becoming a master electrician the moment anything breaks, opening it up, and repairing it on the spot 🧰⚡
Dear Dad,

Thank you for always being our rock, our guide, and the person we can always look up to. Your wisdom, infinite patience, and silent support mean more to us than words can ever express.

Your journey from nothing to everything you’ve achieved is proof of your unstoppable strength and giving nature. Even when you get tough or angry, we always know it comes from a place of pure care.

Having you in our corner is our ultimate safety net—knowing you're always there to support us makes us feel like we can conquer any problem. We love hearing about your life experiences. So, never stop sharing them.

Above all, We pray that you stay healthy and happy every single day. You spend so much time taking care of everyone else, so please remember to look after yourself too.

Wishing you a day filled with the exact same joy, relaxation, and peace you constantly bring into our lives. Keep smiling, and stay healthy and happy always! Happy Father's Day!

❤️ Thank you for everything, Dad! Happy Father's Day! ❤️
